explanation: Body opens with `# Mastra` as a level-1 heading. The rubric explicitly forbids any markdown heading anywhere in the body — the UI renders the org name itself, and a leading title duplicates it. Everything else (bold leads, word count, past tense, content sections) is fine; strip the heading and the body passes.

criteria.name: Body has NO leading line that restates the org's name
criteria.evidence: The leading heading is the org name.
